गई सेवा अविध क! गणना का =ावधान है; और जबक, 1 जनवरी, 2004 से खादी और ामोोग आयोग ने दनांक 14 माच$, 2008 के %थायी आदेश संFया 1668 के तहत नई प8शन %क!म िजसे अब राGीय प8शन पHित कहा जाता है, को अपनाया है; और जबक, िविनयम 15 के =ावधान पूव$ प8शन %क!म से संबंिधत हI तथा उ@ =ावधान को जारी रखने से राGीय प8शन पHित को लागू करने के बारे म8 अ%पJता उKपL हो सकती है और उससे =शासिनक अथवा कानूनी िववाद हो सकता है; अब इसिलए, खादी और ामोोग आयोग अिधिनयम, 1956 (1956 का 61) क! धारा 27 क! उप धारा (3) के अंतग$त =दO शि@य6 का =योग करते Pए के सरकार एतदQारा ऐसे िनरसन से पूव$ ऐसी क! गई चीज8 अथवा कये जाने के िलए छोड़ी गई चीज6 के िसवाय खादी और ामोोग आयोग कम$चारी (प8शन) िविनयम, 1984 के िविनयम 15 को रU करती है। [फा. सं. ए-12034/14/2011-केवीआई-II] बी. एच. अिनल कुमार, संयु@ सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st October, 2015 S.O. 2691 (E).—WHEREAS, vide notification number G.S.R.686(E), dated the 26th September, 1984, the Khadi and Village Industries Commission, with the previous sanction of the Central Government, had published the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Employees (Pension) Regulations , 1984 (hereinafter referred to as the said regulations), for the employees of Khadi and Village Industries Commission; AND WHEREAS, regulation 15 of the said regulations provides for counting of the period of service rendered under the trading establishment or on contract for the purpose of computing pension; AND WHEREAS, with effect from the 1st day of January, 2004, the Khadi and Village Industries Commission has adopted New Pension Scheme now called the National Pension System vide Standing Order number 1668, dated the 14th March, 2008; AND WHEREAS, the provisions of regulation 15 relates to earlier pension scheme and continuation of the said provision may create ambiguity regarding the applicability of the National Pension System and lead to administrative or legal dispute; NOW THEREFORE, in exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section (3) of section 27 of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Act, 1956 (61 of 1956), the Central Government hereby rescinds regulation 15 of the Khadi and Village Industries Commission Employees (Pension) Regulations, 1984, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such rescission. [F. No. A-12034/14/2011-KVI-II] B. H. ANIL KUMAR Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
